summary: ARENAKORE Coach Studio — Full Enterprise SaaS Dashboard tested. All 51 backend API tests passed (100%). All 5 frontend modules verified visually and interactively via Playwright at 1440x900 desktop viewport. Login with ogrisek.stefano@gmail.com / Founder@KORE2026! working correctly.

minor.issue: Response does not include 'scans_per_week' field, but frontend ai.tsx line 134 references f.scans_per_week. Renders as empty/blank before '/sett' in Performance Forecast meta: shows '/sett · LVL 9→9' instead of '0.1/sett · LVL 9→9'.

ui_bugs.issue: ai.tsx line 134: {f.scans_per_week}/sett — scans_per_week field is NOT returned by /api/coach/ai-full. The meta row shows '/sett · LVL 9→9' without a leading number. No 'undefined' text appears (React silently drops it) but value is visually blank.

action_items: MINOR: Add 'scans_per_week' to /api/coach/ai-full forecast response OR change ai.tsx forecastMeta to use 'trend' or a calculated field instead of f.scans_per_week. The `spw` variable (scans per week) is calculated in the backend but not exposed in the response.
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 new coach endpoints verified: GET /api/coach/heatmap (30-cell grid, intensity), GET /api/coach/alerts (severity-sorted, danger/warning/info), GET /api/coach/historical/{id} (7 months including Now), GET /api/coach/battle-stats (wins/losses/win_rate), POST /api/coach/battle-simulate (weighted score + breakdown), GET /api/coach/ai-full (injury_risks ≤5, forecasts ≤8)

PANOPTICON fully verified: 5-item sidebar (PANOPTICON/ATLETI/ARCHITECT/STRATEGIST/AI COACH), 5 KPI cards, 30-cell heatmap SVG, Alert Center with 1 CRITICAL badge, Battle History with LIVE and LOSS entries
ATLETI: 9 athletes in sortable table, DNA mini bars, DNA Radar Comparison panel, Historical Trends panel triggered by clicking athlete row (line chart with Forza/Resistenza/Velocità shown)
ARCHITECT: Exercise palette 6 items tappable, blocks correctly added to session, AUTO-SCALE DNA + PUSH TO ATHLETE buttons present, AI SUGGESTION + GENERA SESSIONE AI working
STRATEGIST: 3 stat boxes (0 wins, 1 loss, 0% WR), battle list (LIVE + SCONFITTA), CALCOLA SCORE with 2 athletes selected returned KORE Battle Score 87 HIGH INTENSITY
AI COACH: Injury Risk Predictor shows STEFANO (ALTO, 100%) + THUNDER_MAN (MEDIO, 32%), Performance Forecast 8 athletes with +1.0 DNA/30g trend icons, AI KORE Engine v2 note at bottom

Minor: scans_per_week field missing from ai-full response causes blank display in forecast meta.
rca_of_issue: scans_per_week RCA: In server.py get_full_ai_analysis(), the variable 'spw' (scans_per_week) is computed as max(0.1, 7/max(days_since, 1)) but NOT included in the forecasts dict appended at line 2056. Fix: Add 'scans_per_week': round(spw, 1) to the forecasts.append() dict.
